questions.question: What four states can you see from the Sears Tower skydeck on a clear day?
Whose father penned the controversial book Who Killed Kurt Cobain?
What rotund talk show host was hired to hype Florida orange juice, prompting the NAACP to institute a "Drink Prune Juice" campaign?
What bay do Royal Bengal tigers most often swim in?
Whose 1998 funeral was highlighted by a plane flying over Chicago with a banner that read, "Heaventh Inning Stretch"?
What magazine has the widest circulation in the U.S.?
